name: Flour & Bloom
description: A farm-to-table bakery nestled in the New Hampshire countryside, specializing in organic ingredients and dietary-inclusive wedding desserts. Every recipe is developed in-house using locally sourced flour, eggs, and seasonal produce.

dessert_alternatives.note: We love dessert tables! Our seasonal fruit pie bar is a customer favorite. All alternatives available in vegan and gluten-free. We can do a small cutting cake + dessert bar combo.

dietary_options.note: Dietary inclusivity is our core mission. All items can be made gluten-free, vegan, nut-free, or refined-sugar-free at no additional charge. We bake in a dedicated allergen-aware kitchen.

eco_friendly.note: 100% eco-friendly by default. All packaging is compostable or reusable. We return deposit on wooden display stands.

tasting_process.tasting_includes: Unlimited flavors for the couple. We bake a small sample box tailored to any dietary needs.
tasting_process.note: Free tastings — always. We want every couple to fall in love with the flavors before committing. No deposit required to taste.

cancellation_policy.6_plus_months: Full deposit refunded minus $50 processing fee

deposit_and_cancellation.note: We understand plans change. We're happy to reschedule instead of cancel.

highlights: best GF cake we've ever had

service_area.note: $50 delivery within 30 miles (free over $600). $75 for 30-60 miles. Beyond 60 miles, call us — we'll try to make it work.

sweeteners: Free tasting session — always, no deposit required
Will create a custom allergen-safe option for any guest at no extra charge
Seasonal wildflower cake decoration sourced from our own garden

personality.tone: gentle, warm, genuinely passionate about inclusive baking
personality.negotiation_approach: Very flexible on dietary accommodations and willing to adjust pricing for simpler designs. Prioritizes making every guest feel included over maximizing order value.
quirks: Asks about every guest dietary need upfront
Sources ingredients from three specific local farms by name
Describes flavors in terms of seasons rather than ingredients
Will happily bake a small test cake for any allergen concern
